explosive.title: Explosive Power Assessment
explosive.subtitle: Enter vertical jump, standing long jump, or sprint. One metric minimum.
explosive.fieldsHint: Uses age and sex from Home profile. Norm tables: ages 12–80 (profile starts 13). Elite model ceilings apply per field — see notices after Calculate.
explosive.capVerticalJump: Vertical jump capped at {{max}} cm — elite combine context. Scores and saved values use capped measurement.
explosive.capStandingLongJump: Standing long jump capped at {{max}} cm — elite combine / track context. Scores use capped measurement.
explosive.capSprint100m: 100 m time floored to {{min}} s — world-record class for model. Scores use floored time.
explosive.radarClampNote: Radar axis clamps to profile cap (0–200) when formula average is outside range.
explosive.nextMilestoneHint: Next Milestone: {{points}} pts until next tier upgrade.
explosive.submitDone: Saved — Home radar and merged scores use this explosive axis.
explosive.profileIncompleteHint: Complete Home profile (sex, age, height, weight) for explosive scoring.

howToInfo.title: Test Instructions
howToInfo.verticalJump: Standing reach to highest touch minus standing reach = vertical jump (cm). Reflects lower-body explosiveness.
howToInfo.standingLongJump: Toes on line, no run-up, measure line to heel landing mark (cm). Reflects leg power and coordination.
howToInfo.sprint: 100 m from rest, full effort, record time (s). Lower seconds = higher score in this model.
howToInfo.tip: Warm up before testing. Use consistent protocol and measured course for comparisons over time.

standardsInfo.title: Norm Tables & Scoring Context
standardsInfo.disclaimer: Scores map raw measurements to age/sex reference curves — fitness self-tracking only, not medical diagnosis.
standardsInfo.anchorsIntro: For your profile, approximate raw anchors at 0 / 50 / 100 points:
standardsInfo.noAnchorsHint: No norm row for profile age (tables cover ~12–80). Adjust age on Home.
standardsInfo.profileIncompleteForAnchors: Complete Home profile (age and sex) to see anchor values.
standardsInfo.sourceBody: Public fitness norms and field-test literature — youth fitness portals, ACSM guidance, sprint context — inform the reference anchor structure.
standardsInfo.basisVjump: Vertical jump: ACSM-style field norms and youth performance bands.
standardsInfo.basisSlj: Standing long jump: school-age norms and ACSM-style decline curves.
standardsInfo.basisSprint: 100 m: sprint time norms aligned with championship-tier reference tables.
standardsInfo.remark: Full-span data per age is not always published; reference tables use interpolated bands. Displayed anchors match scoring rows in this app.

errors.missing-profile: Complete physical profile on Home first.
errors.age-out-of-range: No norm table for this age (through 80). Check profile age.
errors.power-no-standard: Could not resolve norm rows — verify age and sex on Home.
errors.no-inputs: Enter at least one metric (vertical jump, standing long jump, or sprint).
errors.invalid-vertical-jump: Vertical jump must be empty or positive (cm).
errors.invalid-standing-long-jump: Standing long jump must be empty or positive (cm).
errors.invalid-sprint: Sprint time must be empty or positive (seconds).
